classes.name: channel_app.core.integration.BaseIntegration

methods.name: channel_app.core.integration.BaseIntegration.do_action
documentation:
Runs the command given with the key and supplies the additional parameters to the command.

```
param key

Command key

param kwargs

Any additional parameters can be specified, for example  must be
supplied if you want to provide input to the action.

return

Result of the command
```

methods.name: channel_app.core.integration.BaseIntegration.do_action_async_run
documentation:
Runs the command given with the key asynchronously and supplies the additional parameters
to the command.

```
param key

Command key

param kwargs

Any additional parameters can be specified, for example  must be
supplied if you want to provide input to the action.

return

Result of the command
```

methods.name: channel_app.core.integration.BaseIntegration.catalog
documentation:
Retrieves the catalog object using the `catalog_id` stored in the `self`.

Side effect: It stores the result in the `self.catalog_object`, if catalog is updated
on the currently running task you must delete self.catalog_object and re-call this method

methods.name: channel_app.core.integration.BaseIntegration.channel
documentation:
Retrieves the channel object using the `channel_id` stored in the `self`.

Side effect: It stores the result in the `self.channel_object`, if channel is updated
on the currently running task you must delete self.channel_object and re-call this method

To integrate with any system you must create a class which inherits from BaseIntegration.
This class was designed to work with `command design pattern` which basically defines
a task procedure interface. All defined commands override some of the default base
methods according to their requirements.

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.CommandInterface.get_data
documentation: This method fetches the input data for the command.

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.CommandInterface.transform_data
documentation: This method can be used to format the input data before it is executed on the run method.

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.CommandInterface.validated_data
documentation:
If the input data needs to satisfy some conditions or contain required a parameter, the
validation is done here.

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.CommandInterface.send
documentation:
If the command sends a request using input data to achieve the main object of the
command, it is recommended to place those operations in this method.

```
param validated_data

```

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.ChannelCommandInterface.send_request
documentation:
If the command sends a request using input data to achieve the main object of the
command, it is recommended to place those operations in this method.

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.ChannelCommandInterface.run
documentation:
Main flow of the command. `do_action` method of the integration class executes this method.
This method must also call necessary command interface methods.
\:return: returns to response of the command if it has one.

classes.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface.__init__
documentation:
---
param batch_request: Related batch request to keep track of the whole task
param integration: Integration object
param objects: Input to the command
---

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface.run
documentation:
Main flow of the command. `do_action` method of the integration class executes this method.
This method must also call necessary command interface methods.
\:return: Response of the command or None

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface.create_log_file
documentation:
Log files are attached to batch requests. If you need to attach logs
to a problematic command or want to see detailed logs for standard a
command, you can use this method. However, if you do not use a batch request
for a command and still want to see the logs, You will need to manage the command
with a batch request.

```
param message

Reason of the exception/entry logged

param raw_request



param raw_response

```

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface.update_batch_request
documentation:
Batch requests are used to track state of long-running processes across multiple
systems. State of those requests can be managed through this method.

```
param content_type

String values of the ContentType enum model

param remote_batch_id

Batch request id of the

param objects_data

```

methods.name: channel_app.core.commands.OmnitronCommandInterface.create_batch_objects
documentation:
In batch requests, you can attach Omnitron objects that are being processed in that batch
so that they are excluded from further calls until that batch is finalized with done or
fail statuses.

```
param data

List of objects which are being processed for this batch request

param content_type

String values of the ContentType enum model
```

Commands implement list of steps to achieve a task. A command can contain a simple get request
or a complicated business logic with lots of validation.

classes.name: channel_app.omnitron.integration.OmnitronIntegration

methods.name: channel_app.omnitron.integration.OmnitronIntegration.__init__
documentation:
Some environment parameters are stored in the integration object for convenience.

```
param create_batch

Flag to decide whether a batch request to be created
```

Communicates with the Omnitron Api services through the commands defined. It manages
OmnitronApiClient object on enter and exit methods.

methods.name: channel_app.omnitron.batch_request.ClientBatchRequest.to_ongoing

If channel has not finished the batch yet, once we query for it after an interval, we

methods.name: channel_app.omnitron.batch_request.ClientBatchRequest.to_fail
documentation:
If channel fails completing the batch, batch request is finalized with fail state.
\:param batch_request:
\:return:

methods.name: channel_app.omnitron.batch_request.ClientBatchRequest.to_done
documentation:
If all objects are processed disregarding the fact that they succeeded or failed,
batch request is finalized with done.
\:param batch_request:
\:return:

Batch requests work as a state machine. They are used to track state of a flow that must
be running across multiple systems. It starts at initialized state.

documentation: TODO Omnitron does not support 2 different attributes with same name on same channel,
If a marketplace uses more than one same-name attributes for different purposes,
in Omnitron they map to a single attribute. Only one of those attributes will be recognized
and an IntegrationAction entry will be created.

classes.name: channel_app.omnitron.commands.product_stocks.ProcessStockBatchRequests
documentation:
Processes response of the channel for the stock update/insert task.
It updates the stock and related model integration action data according to the
channel response.

As input;

objects : List[BatchRequestResponseDto]. Represents channel response for the
stock items that are in the BatchRequest.

batch_request: If related batch request is not supplied, Omnitron will not
be notified of the results.
omnitron_integration.batch_request = batch_request

Batch Request state transition to fail or done

> ```
> return
>
> None
> ```

classes.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryTreeAndNodes

methods.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryTreeAndNodes.normalize_response
documentation:
Convert channel category tree to the format OmnitronIntegration
requires

methods.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryTreeAndNodes.__mocked_request
documentation: Mock a request and response for the send operation to mimic actual channel data

Category trees and categories represent an easy way to find, list, filter
products. Tree representation of the sales channel must be fetched and
all products we want to sell must be assigned to a category.

This command fetches all categories belonging to a sales channels and their
tree structure.

input olarak do_action'da
    objects -> None tipinde kayıt alır. Yani veri almaz
    batch_request -> BatchRequest tipinde kayıt alır. Ana işleme ait
        BatchRequest kaydı. Rapor üretmek için kullanılır.

CategoryTreeDto -> Kategori ağacı ve buna bağlı dalları barındıran veri tipi.

ErrorReportDto -> Rapor için üretilmiş  veri tipi. Hata olmasada uretilebilir.

classes.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryAttributes

methods.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryAttributes.normalize_response
documentation:
Convert channel category tree to the format OmnitronIntegration
requires

methods.name: channel_app.channel.commands.setup.GetCategoryAttributes.__mocked_request
documentation: Mock a request and response for the send operation to mimic actual channel data

Along with classification, categories define a set of common attributes which makes
sense only for that category and not others. To manage this process the attributes
are fetched from the channel and certain validations are done to ensure product is
ready to be sold before sending to the channel.

This command fetches category attributes of a given category id.

classes.name: channel_app.channel.commands.product_stocks.SendUpdatedStocks

methods.name: channel_app.channel.commands.product_stocks.SendUpdatedStocks.__mocked_request
documentation:
Mock a request and response for the send operation to mimic actual channel data
\:param data:
\:return:

Daha once bildirilmiş stokların yeni güncellemelerini ilgili satış kanalına
gönderebilmek için kullanılır.

input olarak do_action'da

: objects -> List[ProductStock] tipinde kayıtları alır.
  batch_request -> BatchRequest tipinde kayıt alır. Ana işleme ait

  > BatchRequest kaydı. Rapor üretmek için kullanılır.

  is_sync -> bool tipinde olan bu işlemin sonucunun hemen mi alınabileceği

  : yoksa bu işlemin sonucunun asenkron mu öğrenilebileceğinin bilgisi

List[BatchRequestResponseDto] -> Stok bildirimi yapildiginda sonucu hemen

: donuyorsa hazirlanir. Eğer bildirimin sonucu daha sonra kontrol edilecekse
  bu tip veri yerine None tipinde dönüş yapılır

ErrorReportDto -> Rapor için üretilmiş veri tipi. Hata olmasada uretilebilir.

List[ProductStock] -> objects içerisinde geçilmiş veridir. Belki Monkey Patch
: > yapılmış objeleri barındırıyor olabilir.

  ```
  return

  do_action çıktısı olarak
  (List[BatchRequestResponseDto], ErrorReportDto, List[ProductStock])
  listesi döner
  ```

Bildirilmiş stokların durumlarını satış kanılana sorularak öğrenilmesi
için kullanılır.

input olarak do_action'da
: objects -> batch_request tipinde veri alır. Bu veri durumunu kontrol

  : edilecek olan daha önce bildirim işleminde bulunmuş batch_request
    kaydıdır.

  batch_request -> BatchRequest tipinde kayıt alır. Ana işleme ait

  : BatchRequest kaydı. Rapor üretmek için kullanılır.

List[BatchRequestResponseDto] -> Stok bildirimi yapildiginda sonucu hemen

: donuyorsa hazirlanir. Eğer bildirimin sonucu daha sonra kontrol edilecekse
  bu tip veri yerine None tipinde dönüş yapılır

ErrorReportDto -> Rapor için üretilmiş veri tipi. Hata olmasada uretilebilir.

BatchRequest -> objects içerisinde geçilmiş veridir. Belki Monkey Patch
: > yapılmış objeleri barındırıyor olabilir.

  ```
  return

  do_action çıktısı olarak
  (List[BatchRequestResponseDto], ErrorReportDto, BatchRequest)
  listesi döner
  ```
